articles.title: Microsoft will offer voluntary retirement to thousands of employees in a first for tech giant - GeekWire
articles.description: Microsoft is offering a one-time voluntary retirement program for the first time in its 51-year history, giving thousands of long-serving U.S. employees a chance to leave with a financial payout and extended healthcare as it works to control costs amid a mass…
articles.content:
Time to hang it up? Microsoft will be giving some employees that chance. (GeekWire Photo / Todd Bishop)
